zh.lifeSummary: 當Julia Mary de Burton於1372年4月12日出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Andrew Thomson de Burton22歲，母親Celia Thompson22歲。她於1403年與Geoffrey Webb在英國貝德福爾史達科特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1425年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Burton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a placename that is very common in central and northern England. The derivation in most cases is from Old English burh ‘fort’ (see Burke ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

nameMeanings.name: Julia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman family name   Julius .  A woman called Julia is mentioned in Paul's Epistle to the Romans (Romans 16:15), and the name was borne by numerous early saints. Its frequency increased with the vogue for classical names in the 18th century, and it continues to enjoy considerable popularity, although the recent introduction of   Julie   to the English-speaking world has reduced this somewhat. Well-known bearers include the British actress  Julia Foster  (  b. 1941 ) and American actress  Julia Roberts  (  b. 1967  as  Julie Fiona Roberts ).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Julia Mary de Burton was born on 12 April 1372, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Andrew Thomson de Burton, was 22 and her mother, Celia Thompson, was 22. She married Geoffrey Webb in 1403, in Stratford, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1425, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

ja.lifeSummary: Julia Mary de Burtonが1372年4月12日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Andrew Thomson de Burtonは22歳，母Celia Thompsonは22歳であった。1403年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアストラトフォードでGeoffrey Webbと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1425年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Julia Mary de Burton(이)가 1372년 4월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew Thomson de Burton(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Celia Thompson(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1403년 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트라트퍼드에서 Geoffrey Webb(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey Webb в 1403 г. в местности стратфорд, бедфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1425 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.
